Seal and unseal operations
Returns the seal status of the Vault server. This is an unauthenticated endpoint.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Seals the Vault. In HA mode, only an active node can be sealed. Standby nodes should be restarted to seal them.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Submit a portion of a master key to unseal the Vault. Multiple keys must be submitted until the threshold is reached.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Vault System Backend API

description.content:
API for system-level operations in HashiCorp Vault including health checks, seal status, initialization, authentication management, secrets engine configuration, audit devices, policies, and general Vault configuration.

Contact Support:
 Name: HashiCorp Support
 Email: support@hashicorp.com
